reviews_list.batch_info: M.Arch in Landscape Architecture - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Learn, practice, and improve with MKSS BNCA.

review_content.Placements: As we all know, placements in architecture are minimal, and we have to develop ourselves through practice and projects. We secured internships; some offered stipends, depending on the company. Companies like Utkarsh Construction and BM Construction hired us as interns, offering roles like designer and architect.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure and facilities are good, but Wi-Fi is not available on campus; we can only access it in the computer lab. The library is open 24/7 during exams and usually during the daytime. There are several hostels outside the college, and the mess food is of the best quality. However, the canteen food is not good. Medical kits are available at the sports ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with faculty members, placements, and infrastructure of our college.

review_content.Placements: Placements provided in our college are good. Students who score a 7 CGPA are eligible for placements. Top recruiting companies are NASA and other high-end companies. Students can start their firms.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has high security. CCTV cameras are installed on the campus. Food served in the canteen is good and reasonable.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and teach students using real-life examples. Every year, an educational tour is conducted by faculty members. Semester exams are conducted by SPPU. The pass percentage is 33%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% to 80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 2 LPA and the lowest salary was Rs.20,000 per annum. NASA and other well-known companies recruited students from our college. Students with above 7.0 CGPA got placements to become good entrepreneurs.
review_content.Infrastructure: It had a four-storey building with an amphitheater, auditorium, and lab room. Our campus was surrounded by greenery with good security. Canteen served good food. Water cooler was provided on every floor for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: College is excellent, bit expensive but staff is very cooperative, all facilities related arch is available, skilled staff, campus is bit small but sufficient, top rankings in B.Arch colleges as it is architecture college placements are less, but it developed students skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice, Wi-Fi are available only for work propose, digital teaching classrooms, library is quite nice and bid books are available is good amount, librarian is also polite and cooperative.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are well qualified, teaching quality is nice some teachers are new and less experienced. Ppr are average as it comes under sppu university. Viva are so conducted like mega sessions etc., to get students idea by external juror before their academic exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good faculty members and great infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide placements, but we are exposed to various practical knowledge as they conduct site visits for market surveys. It conducts study tours every year. We also get a chance to do a few internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has so many labs like fabrication lab, wood workshop lab, etc. In our auditorium, various seminars and juries are conducted. It has a small canteen which is connected with the central courtyard, which acts as a space for everyone to gather. It also has indoor sports rooms and an indoor stationary shop. It has large studios for flexibility of working. It has a library with all kinds of books. There is a good landscaping service on the campus, a basketball court, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolute best quality of faculty and education provided.

review_content.Placements: Good placement options are provided along with helpful guidance of the faculty mentors! Though currently being in 3rd year, I've seen and received reviews from my senior batches saying good exposure in the industry with versatile options. Average stipend offered during internship ranges from 4-10k.
review_content.Infrastructure: An okay-to-do infrastructure is currently present with fine quality of spaces and there are further chances of development. Bad quality food served in the college canteen but a good option of food outside the campus are found easily. Hostel facility is okay but the students generally prefer other hostels around the campus providing better facilities all together.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Marine Biology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure is available.

content.Placements: Approximately 89 percentage of students were placed in our college. More than 20 companies visited our college, with the highest salary package of 17.5 LPA and the lowest salary package of 3 LPA. A few students got internships in other places.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure and better facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi with unlimited access, a library with research papers and articles, a mess and canteen that are very hygienic and clean, and decent food quality. Medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Marine Biology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good decisions make a better future.

content.Placements: Very good placement opportunities are available in this college for the students. The companies visiting this college for placements are Wipro, Accenture, TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, Microsoft, Tata and Tesla. Packages offered for this department include the highest being 13 LPA, the lowest being 1.2 LPA with an average of 4.8 LPA. Top roles are offered in good internships. About 40 percent of the students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is available in my college with quality food in the canteen, mess and the hostels. The college provides all the facilities including classrooms, library, labs, systems, books, transportation, playground, sports along with indoor games. .

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Marine Biology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: High rate of placements and studies.

content.Placements: The placements are excellent. All students will be placed from this Marine Biology course. The highest package was 60 LPA, the lowest package was 5 LPA, and the average package is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Government Agencies, NOAA, NASA, American Red Cross.
content.Infrastructure: The college is at Port Blair. We have excellent nature vibes and a huge college with a large ground. We have a large auditorium, libraries, classrooms, labs with sufficient equipment, canteen, food stalls, medical facilities, and games are played. Good food is provided in the hostels.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Marine Biology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good placements and good staff.

content.Placements: The highest average package offered for our course is around 5 to 10 lacs per year, and the lowest average package is between 4 and 5 lacs. The percent of students placed in the course is 80 percent with the top companies like NOAA, Celgene Biologicals, etc. And top roles offered are marine biologist, marine scientist, marine researcher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is around 4 acres, with facilities like free Wi-Fi, good classrooms, nice labs for anatomy, etc. And the special labs for marine biology and the multiple grounds are there; a hostel facility is there with good food; a medical clinic is also there; and sports are well conducted .

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Marine Biology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for Marine Biology

content.Placements: There is no placement cell designed for marine Biology students on our campus but many private agencies and companies hire our students they get an interview and if selected placed, as compared to other universities we have the best faculty and students definitely get much knowledge and are mostly self talent, a student passed out from Andaman campus can definitely get placed or else he can have his own startup or he/she may get into Ph.D. for a doctorate most of my seniors are doing Ph.D. in various institutes that's what I know.
content.Infrastructure: As compared to the mainland facilities, in Andaman, they are adequate, everything is a little costlier than the mainland, coming to our department: department of ocean studies and marine Biology well-equipped with various practical instruments and all, we have an exquisite campus; it is the perfect blend of ecosystems for a marine biologist to learn and do research; we have corals, beeches, seaweed ecosystem and different vegetation, just like everything in one place is our Andaman campus. We have a Wi-Fi facility in our campus and hostels; we have labs, classrooms are very well mostly we involved in practicals as it's a practical subject we roam and see a good deal of flora and fauna around and we have a comprehensive library over here there are thousands of books and with a student library card, one can be allowed. Facilities in hostels are very good, very good infrastructure everything is well-equipped with good interior, quality of food is good, everyone will have unique tastes but one must adjust and be adaptive to the surrounding, little bit problem with the freshwater facility, it's limited we have to use it properly, we have a first aid facility, a shuttle court is between hostels so that we can play, no big ground or something like that to play cricket and all.

There will also be an average facility for sports and games. The hostel facilities here are too good. Here, 2 persons per room with a separate bed, table, cupboard, fan, light, etc. Wi-Fi is available, but speed is very slow in all over Andaman. Can't help that.

reviews.review_heading: No placement. Friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is less equipment, and some equipment does not work properly. The department has one smartboard and Wi-Fi connection. There is a common library for the college. The food was average. The mess is contract-based, every year, it changes. Inside, there is a hostel committee and a campus committee, which conduct programmes, etc. There is a small ground in the hostel for throwball, cricket, football, etc.

content.Placements: The placements in this college are close to zero, with this college being degree-entered and looking to just make the student graduate. Do not hope for any campus placements; the most you will get are notifications on WhatsApp about vacancies in various companies. One of the students in my batch got placed for around 3.5 LPA after 6 months of training. I never heard of any more from anyone else. Although students got internship opportunities easily, it was just about the same thing we learned in college, and there was barely any practical learning from them. There were roles offered for Java development, but none of the students got placed because of the high difficulty level of the interview.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with excellent faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are very good. Almost 95% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered varies between 6 LPA - 8 LPA. The placement process is not easy as you have to be good in skills. If you are active in your studies, you will surely get placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are well-maintained. Sports center is available. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. All the necessary facilities are available in this college. There is a huge library on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college and I am satisfied with it.

content.Placements: Approximately 80% of the students got placed in our course. Mainly in the CSE branch, many students got placed. Top recruiting company for our course is mainly TCS. Almost 70% of students got internships from our course. Mainly in the coding part roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department are decent or moderate. Labs are very large and approximately 100 students can sit at a time. Hostel facility is very good because the hostel staff is very familiar with us. Mess and canteen are also good but I would request to change sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is awesome.

content.Placements: I am studying a BBA course in our college, but I have scored average marks in both years. Some companies give more salary packages to our serious in our college. The internships are going on. The highest-paid companies are Wipro, Infosys, etc. A percentage is not needed to get an internship.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, labs and the library are good. Various types of games and sports are available in our college. Our college provides good facilities like a projector installed in classrooms. Extracurricular activities are also conducted in a week. Our canteen makes hygienic food like Rajma Chawal, Roti Sabji, etc.

paragraphs: As per the latest report, the University hosted a panel of over 1,200 recruiters during the 2025 placements. More than 150 job profiles were offered. The highest package offered during RCAS Powered by Sunstone placements 2025 was INR 26 LPA , and the average package stood at INR 4.60 LPA .

The placement team of RCAS Powered by Sunstone keeps track of the dynamic changes taking place across the globe to ensure success with Sunstone’s placement-centric sessions, such as comprehensive interview preparation. The course curriculum of courses like MBA , BBA , BCA , and BTech includes an 8-month internship project that helps students learn the key concepts with a practical approach. Alongside this, 100% of scholarship opportunities are offered to the students. The ROI recorded was 63% higher.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) offers students access to 200+ assured placement opportunities, or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements don’t meet the commitment. To be eligible for POP, students must maintain a minimum average attendance of 70% across all credit and non-credit classes in every semester. They are also required to clear all examinations with a minimum score of 80% or equivalent CGPA, and must not have any backlogs. In addition, students must ensure that all fee payments are made as per the timeline outlined in the offer letter. Lastly, students must strictly adhere to the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program
